methods.name: FixedMap-NDT+ScanContext
methods.note: Fixed-map NDT: target map built once from GT/reference poses (stride=10, map_points=22000). Seed source=scan_context, accepted=98/107, rejected=9, seed fallbacks=86. ScanContext hits=21/107, top_k=10, NDT candidates evaluated=21, mean distance=0.0834.
